questionHtml: Other studies on pulmonary diseases have shown a wide variety of results. Apart from age, sex and severity of COPD, list two other factors that may explain the inconsistent results between studies.
markschemeHtml:
a. «small» sample size

    OR

    only studied in one country

b. methods used

c. environment/pollution/workplace exposure

d. race/genetic factors

e. health status/fitness/BMI of volunteers

[Max 2 Marks]

meta.title: Other studies on pulmonary diseases have shown a wide variety of results. Apart from age, sex and severity of COPD, list two other factors that may explain the inconsistent results
